description: Microsoft Word is open with 'fms_requirements_raw.docx', an unformatted Software Requirements Specification for the Collins Aerospace FMS-4000 Flight Management System. As a Systems Engineer at Collins Aerospace, format this SRS to IEEE 29148-2018 standards before the Critical Design Review. The final document must feature 'Heading 1' style on the eight numbered top-level sections (1. INTRODUCTION through 8. INTERFACE REQUIREMENTS) and 'Heading 2' style on all numbered sub-sections (e.g., 1.1 Purpose, 1.2 Scope, 2.1 Product Perspective, 3.1 Position Determination Requirements, 4.1 Takeoff Performance, 5.1 Flight Plan Entry and Modification, 6.
